title: Vertex acquires Crinetics Pharmaceuticals for $10 billion as biotech M&A booms
summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals has agreed to acquire Crinetics Pharmaceuticals in a $10 billion deal, signaling renewed momentum in biotech M&A activity. The acquisition reflects Vertex's strategy to expand its pipeline through strategic growth investments.

title: AI company Anthropic announces it will begin developing drugs of its own
summary: Anthropic, the AI company behind Claude, has announced plans to enter drug discovery and development itself, expanding beyond AI tools into building therapeutics. This signals a growing trend of AI-native companies moving from software platforms to physical drug pipelines.

title: Online GLP-1 prescriptions are often fast, easy — and low on clinical oversight
summary: A JAMA/Yale secret shopper study found that online prescriptions for GLP-1 weight-loss drugs can be obtained with minimal clinical oversight. Patients reported fast, easy ordering processes with limited medical screening or clinical evaluation before receiving prescriptions.
